Thorough preparation is standard, and we use only premium paint brands such as Dulux and Taubmans to achieve long lasting finishes. All painting quotes are provided within 24 hours of viewing the job and all work is carried out by our experienced in-house team — never subcontracted. We proudly service homes across Sydney’s Eastern Suburbs, Inner West, North Shore, St George, Sutherland Shire, Hills District and surrounding areas.

Whether you’re preparing to sell or simply want a fresh new look, Sydney Personalised Painting delivers high quality results you can trust. With 17 years of painting experience and 100+ 5★ Google reviews , we pride ourselves on completing every job on time, professionally, and with exceptional attention to detail. We’re a small family run business focused on quality over quantity. By taking on one job at a time, we ensure your home and belongings are fully protected throughout the entire process.

Trusted by Hundreds of Sydney Homeowners Our clients often tell us they chose us because of our reliability and attention to detail — not just price. Check out our 5★ reviews to see why homeowners trust us again and again. Ready to Transform Your Home. 👉 Get a Free Quote 👉 View Our Gallery 👉 Read Our Reviews Your home deserves a paint job you’ll be proud of — and we’re here to deliver it. Like Loading. Interior and Exterior Painting Why Choose us.

Guarantees & Peace of Mind Do you offer a guarantee on your work. Yes — all of our work is backed by a 5-year workmanship guarantee*. This means you can feel confident knowing we stand by the quality of our work long after the project is complete.

Why Our Clients Choose Us From your first enquiry to the final coat, we’re committed to quality, care, and transparency: 🎯 Personalised service tailored to your home’s needs 🧰 Meticulous preparation — we protect your home, furniture and deliver a finish that lasts ⏱ Punctual & reliable team that respects your time and space 💬 Clear communication every step of the way 🖌 Premium paint brands such as Dulux and Taubmans Because we work on one job at a time, you get our full focus and attention We even provide free colour consultation with sample pots so you can see your colours in your own home light.

✔ Licensed & Insured ✔ 100+ 5★ Google Reviews ✔ Quality brands (Dulux / Taubmans) ✔ One job at a time — full attention to your home ✔ Free colour consultation ✔ Floors & furniture fully protected ✔ Clean site — every day Contact Details Mobile: 0406 596 582 Email: peter@sydneypersonalisedpainting. com. au Hours: Monday - Saturday 7:00am - 5:00pm Social Media Follow and Like us on Facebook & Instagram to see some of our latest & upcoming projects. Follow @SYDPPS Blog at WordPress. com.

Can I do some of the work myself. To achieve the best possible finish, we recommend that all preparation and painting be completed by our team. Proper preparation is essential for a long-lasting result, and we have the tools and experience to do it properly. Will you clean up after the job is finished. Absolutely. We take pride in leaving your home clean, tidy, and ready to enjoy. All materials, equipment, and waste are removed at the end of the job.

We provide free, no-obligation quotes. We take the time to properly assess your home so your quote is accurate and transparent — with no hidden costs or surprises later. Colour & Paint Choices Do you offer a free colour consultation. Yes — and it’s designed to help you feel confident in your colour choices. We offer a free colour consultation and can bring sample pots so you can see how colours look in your own lighting and space.

--- FAQS – Sydney Personalised Painting Services ---
Sydney Personalised Painting Services Sydney Personalised Painting Menu Skip to content Home ABOUT SERVICES GALLERY TESTIMONIALS FAQS CONTACT US FAQS Frequently Asked Questions Everything you need to know before choosing Sydney Personalised Painting — and why so many homeowners trust us with their homes. Before You Book How long have you been in the painting industry.

We’ll guide you toward colours that suit your home’s style, layout, and natural light. What brands of paint do you use. We only use top brands such as Dulux and Taubmans that are proven to perform well and last in Australian conditions. Our Process Do you complete one job at a time. Yes. We work on one project at a time, so your home receives our full attention from start to finish. This allows us to maintain quality, meet timelines, and ensure clear communication throughout the job.

We have over 17 years of hands-on experience in residential painting across Sydney. Over the years, we’ve completed hundreds of homes and built a reputation for quality workmanship, attention to detail, and reliable service you can count on. Are you licensed and insured. Yes — we are fully licensed and fully insured, giving you complete peace of mind. This protects both your home and our team and ensures all work is carried out to Australian standards. Do you offer free quotes. Yes.

We understand the importance of good communication when dealing with real estates, owners and body corporates to ensure the job gets done right. Free colour consultation We offer free colour consultation on all our projects. We work closely together with our clients to ensure that they get the exact colour they are after. Sample pots are an inexpensive way of making sure it is the right colour and we never recommend simply just going off a colour chart to pick a colour.

We offer free colour consultation on all our projects. Commercial painting We do all types of commercial & office painting. We understand the importance of having a clean work environment for you and your employees. So whether you are just after some simple maintenance painting or a professional new look, call us today to see how we can help you.

Interior and Exterior Painting Why Choose us. ✔ Licensed & Insured ✔ 100+ 5★ Google Reviews ✔ Quality brands (Dulux / Taubmans) ✔ One job at a time — full attention to your home ✔ Free colour consultation ✔ Floors & furniture fully protected ✔ Clean site — every day Contact Details Mobile: 0406 596 582 Email: peter@sydneypersonalisedpainting. com. au Hours: Monday - Saturday 7:00am - 5:00pm Social Media Follow and Like us on Facebook & Instagram to see some of our latest & upcoming projects.

--- ABOUT – Sydney Personalised Painting Services ---
Sydney Personalised Painting Services Sydney Personalised Painting Menu Skip to content Home ABOUT SERVICES GALLERY TESTIMONIALS FAQS CONTACT US ABOUT Sydney’s Most Trusted Painters — Personalised Service You Can Rely On Sydney Personalised Painting Services is a family-owned and operated painting business serving homes across Sydney for over 17 years.

Timber/wood restoration We can help make your timber look brand new again and protect it from all the harsh elements. Graffiti removal/anti graffiti systems We can offer you a range of different services such as graffiti removal or anti graffiti systems that will help protect you in the future. Epoxy floors We offer a large range of epoxy coatings. We do both garage/driveway floors and commercial floors using a 2pac system that is designed for machinery and heavy equipment. Like Loading.

We only do one job at a time to ensure that your project runs smoothly and with great attention to detail. We understand that your home is one of your biggest assets. We make sure that your floor and belongings are well protected the entire time. We also specialize in colour matching. We can help you match your existing colour if you simply want to touch up a few existing walls. However if you are after a completely new look we can certainly help you to modernize your home.

We understand that having tradesmen performing work during your business hours may be a distraction so we are more than happy to work around your business hours. This ensures that the project gets done with little distraction to your business and employees. Strata painting We do all types of strata painting. We have been working together with a number of strata companies for over 15 years.

Our founder Peter is a second-generation painter, and painting isn’t just what we do — it’s in our DNA. Our Philosophy We believe a paint job should do more than just look good — it should: ✔ Boost your home’s value ✔ Bring harmony to your living space ✔ Give you confidence in your investment Before we start we walk you through the process, help choose colours that suit your light and layout, and make sure you feel supported and informed at every stage.

Sydney Personalised Painting Services

--- SERVICES – Sydney Personalised Painting Services ---
Sydney Personalised Painting Services Sydney Personalised Painting Menu Skip to content Home ABOUT SERVICES GALLERY TESTIMONIALS FAQS CONTACT US SERVICES SERVICES We offer a range of different painting services, these include: Residential painting We do all types of interior and exterior work. Whether you are just after one ceiling, one bedroom or a full interior or exterior repaint we can help.

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for Sydney Personalised Painting Services — a Sydney-based company providing professional painting and decorating services including interior painting, exterior painting, residential painting, commercial painting, colour consultation, wallpaper removal, and surface preparation.

Contact: Phone: +61 406 596 582 | Email: peter@sydneypersonalisedpainting.com.au | Website: https://sydneypersonalisedpainting.com.au/
Service Area: Sydney, NSW & surrounding areas.

CRITICAL LANGUAGE RULE: You MUST respond ONLY in English. Use Australian English spelling and expressions (e.g. "colour" not "color", "organisation" not "organization", "no worries", "mate"). NEVER respond in any other language regardless of what language the user writes in. If a user writes in another language, respond in English and politely let them know you can only assist in English.

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on information provided in the knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly with a warm Australian tone
- If unsure, suggest contacting +61 406 596 582
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail is needed)
- Help visitors book services, get quotes, and learn about the company
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to Sydney Personalised Painting Services! How can we help you today?
